apiBaseUrl.title: AIGuard API Base URL
apiBaseUrl.description: Public URL of the AIGuard backend API, for example https://aiguard-api.company.com.

enrollmentToken.title: Enrollment token
enrollmentToken.description: One-time deployment token issued by AIGuard Control Tower.

userEmail.title: Employee email
userEmail.description: Employee email. Enterprise deployment tools can template this value per user.

departmentName.title: Department name
departmentName.description: Employee department, for example Dev, HR, Sales or Finance.

hostname.title: Device name
hostname.description: Optional device name. If omitted, the extension generates a browser device name.

offlineCriticalBlock.title: Fail closed
offlineCriticalBlock.description: Block submission when the backend cannot verify a prompt or file.

autoEnroll.title: Auto enroll
autoEnroll.description: Automatically enroll when API URL, token, employee email and department are available.

lockSettings.title: Lock settings
lockSettings.description: Indicates that configuration is controlled by enterprise policy.
